title: Section 8
content: 1[8. State Government to bear cost of survey.--The total cost of making a survey including the cost of publication of the list or lists of auqaf under this Chapter shall be borne by the State Government.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 27 of 2013, s.10, for section 8 (w.e.f. 1-11-2013).
